import api from'./api';export const getDocuments=async()=>{const response=await api.get('/documents');return response.data;};export const uploadDocument=async formData=>{const response=await api.post('/documents/upload',formData,{headers:{'Content-Type':undefined// Let axios set multipart/form-data with the correct boundary
}});return response.data;};export const deleteDocument=async documentId=>{await api.delete(`/documents/${documentId}`);};export const downloadDocument=async documentId=>{const response=await api.get(`/documents/download/${documentId}`,{responseType:'blob'});return response.data;};export const updateDocument=async(documentId,documentData)=>{const response=await api.put(`/documents/${documentId}`,documentData);return response.data;};
